{{Quote|May his eyes always be bright and cognant!|H-3POB, introducing his master, Vago the Hutt|<ref name="Tempest Feud">''[[Tempest Feud]]''</ref>}}
'''H-3POB''' was a green [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] who served aboard the ''[[Imru Ootmian]]'' and belonged to a group of other droids owned by [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto|Popara the Hutt]]. After he rescued [[Mika Anjiliac Chiera|Mika the Hutt]] from [[Endregaad]], [[Vago Gejalli Thokka|Vago]], Popara's chief aide, returned to [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] with H-3POB. H-3POB was assigned to the delegation when Vago was supposed to meet the agents who rescued Mika later on. Mika himself requested that he meet the agents. This was a plot by Mika to "survive" an assassination attempt. Mika had paid [[Ogo Nan]] to kill him, but had ordered the [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] to ensure no person was injured. Ogo Nan was instead ordered to blast H-3POB, a mission that he carried out. H-3POB was almost destroyed by Ogo Nan's [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], and his parts were used to later repair him.
